name: Gordana Žikić
bio: VSG member and founding participant. Gordana Žikić is a multidisciplinary artist based in Barcelona whose practice engages with alchemy, transformation, and the body's relationship to natural materials and processes. Her work moves across installation, painting, and text.

name: Bosko Begovic
bio: VSG member. Bosko Begovic is a visual artist whose work spans painting, drawing, and mixed media. His practice explores symbolic and psychological landscapes, often working at the boundary between figuration and abstraction.

name: Kübra Köprülüoğlu Aşanlı
bio: VSG member. Kübra Köprülüoğlu Aşanlı is a visual artist and designer working with digital painting and print. Her practice centres on portraiture as an act of restitution — painting marginalised women artists from art history and women of indigenous communities whose ancestral knowledge she works to make visible. She prints her iPad-made works on archival paper and exhibits internationally. She has lived off-grid in a self-built house, taught ecological building, and continues to develop a multisensory exhibition project combining painting, video, sound, and installation.

name: Theresa Wilshusen
bio: VSG member. Theresa Wilshusen is a painter and visual artist. Her work engages deeply with light, colour, and the natural world, often moving between observation and abstraction.

name: Kai Rennes
bio: VSG member. Kai Rennes is a visual artist working across drawing, painting, and printmaking. His practice attends to line and form as carriers of feeling — quiet, precise, and observational.

name: Åsa Ekman
bio: VSG member. Åsa Ekman is a Swedish visual artist working with painting and mixed media. Her practice explores the relationship between the body, nature, and time — often through quiet, durational attention to material and surface.

name: Rosie Hearne

name: Ylva Eklöf
bio: VSG member. Ylva Eklöf is a Swedish artist working with painting and collage. Her practice explores intuitive image-making, often layering found materials with paint to build layered, intimate surfaces.

name: Raymond Watson
bio: VSG member. Raymond Watson is a painter whose work engages with landscape, memory, and the emotional register of place.

name: Seb Bradshaw
bio: VSG member. Seb Bradshaw is a sculptor and writer based in the UK. His three-dimensional works draw on natural materials — shells, glass, found objects — assembled into forms that carry weight and luminosity simultaneously.

name: Cassandra Stubbington
bio: VSG member. Cassandra Stubbington is an artist working with photography and lens-based media. Her images are carefully composed studies of light, nature, and quiet observation — often botanical and intimate in scale.

name: River Reishi
bio: VSG member. River Reishi is a visual artist working across photography and mixed media. Their practice engages with ecology, the body, and the more-than-human world, often through close attention to plant life and organic materials.

name: Juan Antonio Cerezuela
bio: VSG member. Juan Antonio Cerezuela (Cartagena, 1982) is a visual artist based in Barcelona. His work explores the correlation between language, time and space through installation, performance and site-specific works.
